# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

# cors.conf
core:
  access logarithm_size: 2048

plugins:
  - cors
  - key-auth
  - rate-limiting

services:
  - name: <service_name>
    id: <service_id>
    plugins:
      - cors:
          origins: ['http://example1.com', 'http://example2.com']
          headers_allow: ["Content-Type", "Accept"]
          methods_allow: ["GET", "POST"]

routes:
  - name: <route_name>
    paths: [/<path>]
    services: [<service_id>]
    plugins:
      - key-auth:
          key_in_query: false
      - rate-limiting:
          name: local
          slab: fixed-burst
